Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce event log integrating tables Steps Identify cases order id Derive activities Order Created Item Picked maybe per line Order Dispatched per delivery Order Arrived per delivery Invoice Issued per invoice Payment Received per payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also could include Order Delivered maybe combine dispatch arrival as separate events Resource column map sales person id for order created picker id for picking carrier id for dispatch arrival For arrival maybe same carrier Billing person for invoice payment method maybe resource Use resource table to map names

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to handle multiple items could create separate events per item picking Thats fine Multiple deliveries each delivery has dispatch and arrival events Multiple invoices and payments each invoice event and each payment event

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must ensure chronological order per case For each order list events sorted by timestamp

Text: Case 1001 Order Created then Item Picked then Item Picked then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Payment Received Case 1002 Order Created then Item Picked then Item Picked then Order Dispatched then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Invoice Issued then Payment Received then Payment Received Case 1003 Order Created then Item Picked then Item Picked then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued Case 1004 Order Created then Item Picked Case 1005 Order Created then Item Picked then Item Picked then Order Dispatched then Order Arrived then Invoice Issued then Payment Received
